// purpose: Lightweight typecheck for the UI tree. The main tsconfig.json excludes src/ui/**, because the UI is transpiled at runtime by Bun and uses several patterns (NodeListOf iteration, atom factory wrappers) that the strict-mode root config rejects. This permissive config catches the high-value class of bug — missing imports / removed exports / wrong-shape destructures — that would otherwise crash the page at module load with no compile-time signal. Run via `bun run check:ui` (also bundled into `bun run check`).
